_comment: User-tunable process metric thresholds. These are DESCRIPTIVE, not quality judgments. They describe session behavior affected by task complexity, model choice, and intent. Only compliance (baseline.json) is graded.

thrash._comment: How many times the same file can be edited before it signals poor planning.

prompt_clarity._comment: Session shape classification. Research-then-build sessions are NOT penalized — deliberate exploration is legitimate.

cost_efficiency._comment: Tokens per productive tool call (Write/Edit/Bash). Heavily model-dependent — Opus sessions will always score lower here.
